questionHtml:
State two abiotic factors that are increased in the fragmented forest with respect to the centre of the core forest.

1.

2.
markschemeHtml:
a. light «penetration» ✔

b. temperature ✔

c. wind ✔

d. fires ✔

Allow any two but mark only the first two if more are given in a list.

meta.title: State two abiotic factors that are increased in the fragmented forest with respect to the centre of the core forest. 1. 2.
